Notice Of Motion To Transfer Venue To Los Angeles Superior Court
Off Calendar Jan-30-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. CHRISTINA VANDER WERF of Gordon & Rees, LLP, Tel No. (213) 270-7856 appearing telephonically for Defendants Leonard Steiner, and Steiner & Libo, P.C.;
Atty. REGINA ASHKINADZE of Elkin Gamboa & Ashkinadze, LLP, Tel No. (323) 372-1202 appearing for Defendant Nicholas Behunin;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - Matter was not argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS LEONARD STEINER AND STEINER & LIBO, P.C.'S Motion To Transfer Venue To Los Angeles Superior Court is granted. No opposition filed. This action is transferred to Los Angeles County. Plaintiff to pay all transfer costs. No attorneys fees are awarded to Defendant because Defendant does not show that it reasonably made an offer to stipulate to change of venue. (See CCP sec. 396b(b).) ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
